text:
The rate of pilotage that may be adopted under Sections 63.004 (Pilotage Rates and Rules) and 63.021 (Governor Authorizes Appointment) on a class of vessel may not, in a port of this state, exceed $6.50 for each foot of water that the vessel draws when piloted. This section does not apply to the rate of pilotage established under:

(1) Section 69.001 (Short Title) for:

(A) the public ports of Orange, Port Arthur, and Beaumont; and

(B) privately owned docks or terminals in Orange County or Jefferson County;

(2) Chapter 62 (Navigation District Pilot Boards) ; or

(3) Chapters 66-68.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 64. Rates of Pilotage
##### § 64.002 — Pilotage Rate

The rate of pilotage that may be adopted under Sections 63.004 (Pilotage Rates and Rules) and 63.021 (Governor Authorizes Appointment) on a class of vessel may not, in a port of this state, exceed $6.50 for each foot of water that the vessel draws when piloted. This section does not apply to the rate of pilotage established under:

    (1) Section 69.001 (Short Title) for:

        (A) the public ports of Orange, Port Arthur, and Beaumont; and

        (B) privately owned docks or terminals in Orange County or Jefferson County;

    (2) Chapter 62 (Navigation District Pilot Boards) ; or

    (3) Chapters 66-68.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

This section does not apply to the rate of pilotage established under:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: the public ports of Orange, Port Arthur, and Beaumont; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: privately owned docks or terminals in Orange County or Jefferson County;
